commitollama.model.description: Specify the desired model for generating commit messages.

commitollama.useEmojis.description: Enable or disable the use of emojis in commit messages.

commitollama.useDescription.description: Enable or disable the use of commit descriptions.

commitollama.useLowerCase.description: Enable or disable lowercase commit messages.

commitollama.promptTemperature.description: Custom temperature for generating the commit message. (Higher number = more creative)

commitollama.custom.model.description: Allows you to specify any model name. The model has to be downloaded and available on your Ollama instance. **Note:** Ignored if `commitollama.model` is not set to "Custom".

commitollama.custom.language.description: Allows you to specify any language for the commit messages. **Note:** Ignored if `commitollama.language` is not set to "Custom".

commitollama.custom.emojis.description: Map commit types to emojis. Only used if emojis are enabled.

commitollama.custom.endpoint.description: Ollama Server Endpoint. Leave empty to use the default ollama endpoint.

commitollama.custom.prompt.description: Custom prompt to generate the commit message with.

commitollama.custom.typeRules.description: Custom rules for commit message types.

commitollama.custom.descriptionPrompt.description: Custom prompt to generate the commit description with.

commitollama.custom.requestHeaders.description: Custom request headers to send with the Ollama request. Useful for authentication or custom headers.

scripts.publish:major: npm run build && vsce publish major
scripts.publish:minor: npm run build && vsce publish minor
scripts.publish:patch: npm run build && vsce publish patch
